regulations.name: Residential Parking Requirement
regulations.description: Apartment projects in residential zones with more than 10 units must provide at least 1.5 parking spaces per unit.

regulations.name: Green Building Standard
regulations.description: Projects estimated over $5 million must include a condition for LEED certification.

regulations.name: Mixed-Use Residential Minimum
regulations.description: Mixed-use projects must include at least 20% residential units.

regulations.name: Commercial Accessibility
regulations.description: Commercial and retail projects must provide at least 1 accessible parking space per 25 regular spaces.

regulations.name: Industrial Buffer Zone
regulations.description: Industrial projects must have a setback of at least 30 feet when adjacent to residential zones.
